questions.context_sentence: Yaming saw the Guest-Greeting Pine, the Sea of Clouds, lots of strange rocks, and many ancient buildings.
questions.cn: 亚明看到了迎客松、云海、许多奇石和许多古老的建筑。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个古老的人表现得很耐心 (patient)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“adj. 古代的；古老的”的单词：

questions.meaning: n. 度假营；营地 v. 露营；宿营
questions.context_sentence: went to a summer camp
questions.cn: 去夏令营
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 露营地 (camp) 里有一盏漂亮的台灯 (lamp)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: went to a summer ____ (提示: 露营; 营地)

questions.context_sentence: The landscape there was amazing.
questions.cn: 那里的景色太棒了。
questions.hint: 合成词: land (土地) + scape (景象) -> 土地上的景象就是风景。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出单词 landscape 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: lots of strange rocks
questions.cn: 许多奇石
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个陌生 (strange) 的地方发生了一些改变 (change)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“adj. 奇怪的；陌生的”的单词：

questions.context_sentence: Where did Yaming / Emma go on holiday / vacation?
questions.cn: 亚明/艾玛去哪里度假了？
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 假期 (vacation) 去了一个非常好玩的地方 (location)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Where did Yaming / Emma go on holiday / ____?

questions.context_sentence: Don't forget that.
questions.cn: 别忘了那个。
questions.hint: 词干法: for (为了) + get (得到) -> 为了得到新的，就要忘记 (forget) 旧的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Don't ____ that. (提示: 忘记)

questions.context_sentence: It was fantastic.
questions.cn: 太棒了。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个极好的 (fantastic) 玩具是塑料 (plastic) 做的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出单词 fantastic 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: Yes, we stayed in the old town for a few days, and we enjoyed it very much.
questions.cn: 是的，我们在老镇上呆了几天，我们非常喜欢它。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 顺着这条路往下 (down) 走，就是我们的那个小镇 (town)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“n. 镇；商业区”的单词：

questions.meaning: n. 呼吸的空气；一口气
questions.context_sentence: It just took my breath away.
questions.cn: 它简直令人叹为观止。
questions.hint: 形似记忆: breath (呼吸) 和 death (死亡) 只差一个字母，没有呼吸就死亡。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It just took my ____ away.

questions.context_sentence: It just took my breath away.
questions.cn: 它简直令人叹为观止。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: 拿走某人的呼吸 (breath) -> 让人惊讶得说不出话，令人惊叹。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出短语 take sb's breath away 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: Everything tasted good, especially the steamed chicken soup.
questions.cn: 一切都尝起来很好，尤其是汽锅鸡。
questions.hint: 词缀法: especially 是在 specially (特别地) 前加 es 强化语气，意为“尤其”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“adv. 尤其；特别”的单词：

questions.context_sentence: Everything tasted good, especially the steamed chicken soup.
questions.cn: 一切都尝起来很好，尤其是汽锅鸡。
questions.hint: 短语拆解: steamed (蒸的) + chicken (鸡) + soup (汤) -> 汽锅鸡。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出 steamed chicken soup 的正确汉语意思：

questions.meaning: adv. & pron. 在任何地方；随便哪个地方
questions.context_sentence: Did you go anywhere interesting?
questions.cn: 你去了什么有趣的地方吗？
questions.hint: 合成词: any (任何) + where (地方) -> 任何地方。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Did you go ____ interesting?

questions.meaning: pron. 没有事；没有任何东西
questions.context_sentence: I did nothing special.
questions.cn: 我没做什么特别的事。
questions.hint: 合成词: no (没有) + thing (东西) -> 没有东西。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I did ____ special. (提示: 没有做任何事)

questions.context_sentence: Really? Everyone says the scenery around the West Lake is so beautiful.
questions.cn: 真的吗？大家都说西湖周围的风景太美了。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: scen (看，舞台) + ery -> 舞台上的景色就是风景。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“n. 风景；景色”的单词：

questions.context_sentence: Like everyone else, I was ready to go on a holiday somewhere.
questions.cn: 像其他人一样，我准备好去某个地方度过假期了。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: already (已经) 的词根就是 ready (准备好的)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Like everyone else, I was ____ to go on a holiday somewhere.

questions.meaning: adv. 在某处；到某处 pron. 某处；某个地方
questions.context_sentence: Like everyone else, I was ready to go on a holiday somewhere.
questions.cn: 像其他人一样，我准备好去某个地方度过假期了。
questions.hint: 合成词: some (一些) + where (地方) -> 某个地方。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“adv. 在某处；到某处 pron. 某处；某个地方”的单词：

questions.context_sentence: No one could join me, so I went by myself.
questions.cn: 没有人能陪我，所以我自己去了。
questions.hint: 合成词: my (我的) + self (自己) -> 我自己。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: No one could join me, so I went by ____.

questions.context_sentence: I could do nothing but stay in the hotel.
questions.cn: 我除了待在旅馆里什么也做不了。
questions.hint: 固定表达: nothing (没有东西) + but (除了) -> 除了这个没有别的 -> 只有。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出短语 nothing but 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: I could do nothing but stay in the hotel.
questions.cn: 我除了待在旅馆里什么也做不了。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: 后台 (hotel)，大旅馆的后台都很硬。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“n. 旅馆；旅社”的单词：

questions.meaning: adj. 使人舒服的；舒适的
questions.context_sentence: The hotel was nice, with a comfortable bed, and everything was very clean.
questions.cn: 旅馆很好，有一张舒适的床，一切都非常干净。
questions.hint: 词根记忆: comfort (安慰，舒服) + able (能够...的) -> 使人觉得舒服的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出单词 comfortable 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: I felt bored, so I decided to look for something to read.
questions.cn: 我感到很无聊，所以我决定找点东西读。
questions.hint: 形似记忆: 每天对着木板 (board) 就会感到厌倦 (bored)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I felt ____, so I decided to look for something to read. (提示: 厌倦的; 烦闷的)

questions.context_sentence: Look at the sky! How amazing!
questions.cn: 看天空！太神奇了！
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个间谍 (spy) 正抬头看着天空 (sky)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“n. 天；天空”的单词：

questions.context_sentence: I got up and walked towards the window.
questions.cn: 我站起来，朝窗户走去。
questions.hint: 方向后缀: to (向) + wards (表示方向的后缀) -> 朝着某处。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出介词 towards 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: There was a beautiful double rainbow in the sky.
questions.cn: 天空出现了一道美丽的双彩虹。
questions.hint: 合成词: rain (下雨) + bow (弓) -> 雨后天空中像弓一样的七彩桥就是彩虹。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“n. 虹；彩虹”的单词：

questions.context_sentence: Wow, it's a silk scarf.
questions.cn: 哇，这是一条丝绸围巾。
questions.hint: 丝绸 (silk) 摸起来像牛奶 (milk) 一样光滑。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出单词 silk 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: Wow, it's a silk scarf.
questions.cn: 哇，这是一条丝绸围巾。
questions.hint: 谐音联想: 这条 scarf (围巾) 的质量真是“死卡夫” (极好)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“n. 围巾；披巾”的单词：

questions.context_sentence: After that, we went to Red Square.
questions.cn: 在那之后，我们去了红场。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆: “死鬼呀”，在广场 (square) 上大喊死鬼呀。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: After that, we went to Red ____.

questions.context_sentence: during dinner, I didn't feel like eating because I felt sick.
questions.cn: 在晚餐期间，我不想吃东西，因为我感到恶心。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 在春天 (spring) 期间 (during)，繁花盛开。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出介词 during 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: In the morning, we went to the Victory Museum.
questions.cn: 早上，我们去了胜利博物馆。
questions.hint: 联想记忆: 那个胜利 (victory) 将被载入历史 (history) 中。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“n. 胜利；成功”的单词：

questions.meaning: adj. 俄罗斯的；俄罗斯人的 n. 俄罗斯人；俄语
questions.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
questions.cn: 俄罗斯人民建造了这座博物馆，以纪念他们在二战期间与纳粹的斗争。
questions.hint: 音译词: Russia (俄罗斯) + n -> 俄罗斯的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出单词 Russian 的正确汉语意思：

questions.meaning: n. 战斗；搏斗；斗争 v. 打仗；打架
questions.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
questions.cn: 俄罗斯人民建造了这座博物馆，以纪念他们在二战期间与纳粹的斗争。
questions.hint: 战士们在深夜 (night) 依然英勇战斗 (fight)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The Russian people built this museum to remember their ____ against the Nazis during World War II. (提示: 斗争; 战斗)

questions.meaning: n. 导游；指南 v. 领路；指导
questions.context_sentence: I worked as a tour guide at a museum.
questions.cn: 我在一家博物馆当导游。
questions.hint: 导游 (guide) 走在队伍的“最前排” (guide)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“n. 导游；指南 v. 领路；指导”的单词：

questions.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
questions.cn: 俄罗斯人民建造了这座博物馆，以纪念他们在二战期间与纳粹的斗争。
questions.hint: again (再次) + st -> 再次反对 (against) 对方的意见。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出介词 against 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight against the Nazis during World War II.
questions.cn: 俄罗斯人民建造了这座博物馆，以纪念他们在二战期间与纳粹的斗争。
questions.hint: fight (斗争) + against (反对，对抗) -> 与……作斗争。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出短语 fight against 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: In one hall, I saw an artwork with thousands of glass "tears" falling down.
questions.cn: 在一个大厅里，我看到了一件由数千滴玻璃“泪珠”下落组成的艺术品。
questions.hint: 合成词: art (艺术) + work (工作/作品) -> 艺术作品。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“n. 艺术作品；插图”的单词：

questions.meaning: 数以千计的；成千上万的
questions.context_sentence: In one hall, I saw an artwork with thousands of glass "tears" falling down.
questions.cn: 在一个大厅里，我看到了一件由数千滴玻璃“泪珠”下落组成的艺术品。
questions.hint: thousands (成千) + of (的) -> 数以千计的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: In one hall, I saw an artwork with ____ of glass "tears" falling down.

questions.context_sentence: In one hall, I saw an artwork with thousands of glass "tears" falling down.
questions.cn: 在一个大厅里，我看到了一件由数千滴玻璃“泪珠”下落组成的艺术品。
questions.hint: 提着 (tear) 一大袋眼泪。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出名词 tear 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily.
questions.cn: 它提醒我们，战争是可怕的，和平来之不易。
questions.hint: re (再次) + mind (心，脑子) -> 让脑子里再次想起 -> 提醒。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It ____ us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily. (提示: 提醒; 使想起)

questions.context_sentence: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily.
questions.cn: 它提醒我们，战争是可怕的，和平来之不易。
questions.hint: 一片 (piece) 土地上终于迎来了和平 (peace)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“n. 和平；太平”的单词：

questions.context_sentence: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come easily.
questions.cn: 它提醒我们，战争是可怕的，和平来之不易。
questions.hint: easy (容易的) 变 y 为 i 再加 ly -> 容易地。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It reminds us that war is terrible and peace does not come ____.

questions.context_sentence: At noon, we had lunch at a restaurant near the park.
questions.cn: 中午，我们在公园附近的一家餐馆吃了午饭。
questions.hint: 中午 (noon) 很快 (soon) 就要到了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出名词 noon 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: during dinner, I didn't feel like eating because I felt sick.
questions.cn: 晚餐时我不想吃，因为我觉得不舒服/恶心。
questions.hint: 生病 (sick) 的时候不要去摘 (pick) 花。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: during dinner, I didn't feel like eating because I felt ____. (提示: 恶心的; 生病的)

questions.context_sentence: We took the Moscow Metro to travel around.
questions.cn: 我们乘莫斯科地铁四处观光。
questions.hint: “美桌”，地铁站里有一张很美的桌子。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“n. 地下铁道系统”的单词：

questions.context_sentence: The metro stations are really beautiful.
questions.cn: 地铁站真的很美。
questions.hint: 我们国家 (nation) 的火车站 (station) 非常漂亮。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出名词 station 的正确汉语意思：

questions.context_sentence: Sometimes I felt like I was walking inside a palace.
questions.cn: 有时我觉得自己仿佛走在宫殿里。
questions.hint: 王宫 (palace) 是一个非常特别的地方 (place)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出表示“n. 王宫；宫殿”的单词：

questions.context_sentence: Later, someone took out his accordion, and soon everyone got together to sing and dance.
questions.cn: 后来，有人拿出手风琴，很快大家就聚在一起唱歌跳舞。
questions.hint: get (得到，到达) + together (在一起) -> 聚在一起，聚会。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Later, someone took out his accordion, and soon everyone got ____ to sing and dance. (提示: 聚会; 相聚)

questions.context_sentence: I felt sick after staying in the sun for too long.
questions.cn: 在阳光下待了太久后，我感到恶心/不舒服。
questions.hint: 固定搭配: in (在...里面) + the sun (太阳) -> 晒太阳，在阳光下。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选出短语 in the sun 的正确汉语意思：

questions.meaning: n. 预算 v. 精打细算
questions.context_sentence: Don't spend too much on holiday shopping, or you might go over budget.
questions.cn: 不要在节日购物上花太多钱，否则你可能会超出预算。
questions.hint: 拔地鸡，买这只鸡超出了我的预算 (budget)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Don't spend too much on holiday shopping, or you might go over ____. (提示: 预算)

questions.context_sentence: The deer is probably looking for food and hoping to get some from you.
questions.cn: 这只鹿可能正在寻找食物，并希望从你那里得到一些。
questions.hint: look (看) + for (为了...) -> 为了得到某样东西而去看 -> 寻找。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The deer is probably ____ food and hoping to get some from you. (提示: 寻找)
